title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
short_info: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website nitw.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: As per norms and guidelines of the Institute.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): B.Tech/ B.E or Equivalent degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering and M.Tech/ M.E in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Research areas in Signal Processing / Communication / Instrumentation. GATE Qualification is highly preferred. Minimum 60% aggregate marks or 6.5 CGPA at both UG and PG for GEN/ GEN-EWS/ OBC-NCL and 55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ ST/ PwD. Or Bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology with at least CGPA of 7.5/10 or 70% under GEN/ GEN-EWS/ OBC-NCL and 7.0/10 or 65% under SC/ ST/ PwD.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal is 20th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position in this recruitment drive by NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech/M.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent, with research areas in Signal Processing/Communication/Instrumentation. GATE qualification is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per the institute's norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC/SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position at NIT Warangal?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an Interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q9. Which department is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) department of NIT Warangal under the ANRF-ARG project.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and apply through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
